articles.title: PlayStation 6 Officially Announced by Sony
articles.summary: Sony has officially announced the PlayStation 6 console, promising major improvements in graphics and load times over the PS5.

articles.title: Xbox Game Pass Adds 20 New Games This Month
articles.summary: Microsoft announces a wave of 20 new titles arriving on Xbox Game Pass, including several AAA releases.

articles.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Sales Pass 10 Million Units
articles.summary: Nintendo reports the Switch 2 has sold over 10 million units worldwide in less than three months since launch.

articles.title: PC Gaming Market Grows 15% in Q1 2026
articles.summary: New research shows PC gaming revenue grew 15% year-over-year in Q1 2026, driven by indie titles and early access launches.

articles.title: Python Scripting Support Arrives in Popular Game Engine
articles.summary: One of the most widely used PC game engines now supports Python scripting, opening doors for easier modding and rapid prototyping.

articles.title: Best Indie Games of 2026 So Far
articles.summary: We round up the best indie games released so far in 2026, from roguelikes to metroidvanias and cozy farming sims.

articles.title: Review: Stellar Odyssey — A Universe Worth Exploring
articles.summary: Stellar Odyssey delivers a sprawling open-world space adventure with deep lore, rewarding exploration, and satisfying gunplay. Score: 9/10.

articles.title: New Trailer Drops for Dragon Realms: Rebirth
articles.summary: Square Enix drops a stunning new trailer for Dragon Realms: Rebirth, showcasing real-time combat and sprawling fantasy environments.

articles.title: ESL Championship Finals Set for July in Berlin
articles.summary: ESL announces the CS2 Championship Finals will be held in Berlin this July, with a $2 million prize pool on the line.

articles.title: Major Publisher Acquires Beloved Indie Studio
articles.summary: In a surprise announcement, a major games publisher has acquired the studio behind several beloved indie hits, promising creative independence.

articles.title: NVIDIA RTX 5090 Benchmarks Leaked Online
articles.summary: Early benchmarks for NVIDIA's upcoming RTX 5090 GPU have leaked, showing significant performance gains over current-gen cards.

articles.title: PlayStation VR3 Gets a Price Drop Ahead of E3
articles.summary: Sony slashes the price of the PlayStation VR3 headset by $100, making it more accessible heading into the big summer game showcase.

articles.title: Xbox Series X|S Gets New Dashboard Update
articles.summary: Microsoft rolls out a new dashboard update for Xbox Series X|S, bringing improved performance tracking and a redesigned home screen.

articles.title: Python-Powered Modding Tools Released for Sandbox RPG
articles.summary: Developers of the popular Sandbox RPG have released a Python-based modding toolkit, letting players create complex in-game systems with ease.

articles.title: Top 10 PC Games to Play This Summer
articles.summary: From open-world RPGs to competitive shooters, here are the ten PC games you absolutely need to play this summer.

articles.title: Indie Dev Raises $5M to Build Dream Puzzle Game
articles.summary: A solo indie developer has raised $5 million on Kickstarter to create an ambitious narrative puzzle game inspired by classic point-and-click adventures.

articles.title: Review: Horizon Zero Dawn 3 Is a Masterpiece
articles.summary: Guerrilla Games delivers a breathtaking conclusion to the Horizon trilogy with stunning visuals, compelling story, and addictive gameplay. Score: 10/10.

articles.title: Summer Game Fest Lineup Revealed
articles.summary: Geoff Keighley reveals the full Summer Game Fest lineup with over 40 world premieres and major updates from top studios.
